006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
027
028/**
029 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link Json5lSerializer}.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Extends {@link JsonlSerializerSession} to inherit JSONL's line-delimited framing.  When the
033 * owning {@link Json5lSerializer} has {@link Json5lSerializer.Builder#json5Sugar() json5Sugar}
034 * enabled, the per-line output switches to JSON5 sugar (single-quoted strings, unquoted field names
035 * where safe) on both the databind and token-streaming paths; otherwise the inherited strict
036 * RFC-8259 output is used unchanged.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
040 * </ul>
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Json5l">JSON5L Basics</a>
044 * </ul>
045 */
046@SuppressWarnings({
047   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
048   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable
049   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
050})
051public class Json5lSerializerSession extends JsonlSerializerSession {
052
053   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
054
055   private static final char SUGAR_QUOTE = '\'';
056
057   /**
058    * Builder class.
059    */
060   public static class Builder extends JsonlSerializerSession.Builder {
061
062      final Json5lSerializer ctx;
063
064      /**
065       * Constructor
066       *
067       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
068       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
069       */
070      protected Builder(Json5lSerializer ctx) {
071         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
072         this.ctx = ctx;
073      }
074
075      @Override
076      public Json5lSerializerSession build() {
077         return new Json5lSerializerSession(this);
078      }
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Creates a new builder for this object.
083    *
084    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
085    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
086    * @return A new builder.
087    */
088   public static Builder create(Json5lSerializer ctx) {
089      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
090   }
091
092   private final boolean json5Sugar;
093
094   /**
095    * Constructor.
096    *
097    * @param builder The builder for this object.
098    */
099   protected Json5lSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
100      super(builder);
101      json5Sugar = builder.ctx.isJson5Sugar();
102   }
103
104   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSerializerSession */
105   protected JsonWriter getJsonWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
106      if (! json5Sugar)
107         return super.getJsonWriter(out);
108      var output = out.getRawOutput();
109      if (output instanceof JsonWriter output2)
110         return output2;
111      var w = JsonWriter.create(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isEscapeSolidus(), SUGAR_QUOTE, true, isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
112      out.setWriter(w);
113      return w;
114   }
115
116   @Override /* Overridden from JsonlSerializerSession */
117   public TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException {
118      if (! json5Sugar)
119         return super.serializeTokens(output);
120      var walk = new PojoWalker.Options(
121         isKeepNullProperties(),
122         isTrimEmptyMaps(),
123         isTrimEmptyCollections(),
124         isSortMaps(),
125         isSortCollections(),
126         isTrimStrings(),
127         getMarshallingContext());
128      var settings = new JsonTokenWriter.Settings(
129         false /* useWhitespace — JSON5L is one-record-per-line, no pretty-print */,
130         getMaxIndent(),
131         SUGAR_QUOTE,
132         isEscapeSolidus(),
133         isTrimStrings(),
134         true /* simpleAttrs — JSON5 sugar: unquoted field names where safe */,
135         walk,
136         false /* disableObject */);
137      return JsonlTokenWriter.forOutput(output, settings);
138   }
139}
